svg.text: DRIVER CELL — TOP-SIDE ROUTING · ULN FLIPPED · 2-2-2-2 RAILS
Chips 1 row further apart (11-row gap). Middle rails: 2 empty rows to each chip and 2 between each rail.
ULN notch RIGHT → IN on top, OUT on bottom. Channels reorder — set logical order in firmware (MAP).
OUT1–8 drop to landing holes → solenoid low side (direct-solder). Numbers = OUT channel.
Land each jumper in the FREE hole next to the
pin; solder its tail across to the pin's pad on
the bottom. Rail ends drop into a free rail hole.
TOP: logic bundle, SH_CP, ST_CP, DS, VCC/MR,
Wider gap → 7 identical logic jumpers now span 13 holes ≈ cut 50 mm, bend L.
Q0 is the long one (≈22 holes ≈ 70 mm). Cut/shape the 7 together.
